name: Career Path Recommendation System
desc: A Career Path Recommendation System is a smart application that helps users choose the best career based on their skills, interests, and goals

name: Advanced Computational Techniques Identification
desc: This project demonstrates an AI-driven system designed to detect fraudulent financial transactions in real time. By combining machine learning, anomaly detection, and deep learning techniques, the system analyzes transaction patterns and assigns a fraud risk score. The interactive dashboard visualizes live transaction data, alerts, and behavioral insights, providing a modern fintech security solution.

name: Customer Support Chatbot Using LLM
desc: AI-powered chatbot using Large Language Models to automate customer support with accurate, real-time, and context-aware responses.
